title: australian courgettes gratin
description: a crowd-pleasing, dense and springy australian dish featuring courgettes, ideal for weeknights and gatherings, this gratin is a game-changer for veggie lovers.

ingredients.name: courgettes (4-6 medium)
ingredients.notes: preferably a mix of green and yellow for color

instructions: preheat oven to 180c and butter a 20cm square baking dish.
slice the onion and leek thinly, and sauté in olive oil until softened.
add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add the sliced courgettes, salt and pepper, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
mix in the grated cheddar and parmesan cheese.
transfer the courgette mixture to the prepared baking dish and drizzle with milk.
dot the top with butter and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
remove the foil and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
